languages.text: {n}Торпедный залп сотрясает флагман, и творение ксеносов разлетается на куски под его сокрушительным натиском. По расчетам корабельных инженеров, прямое попадание должно оставить от нее лишь оплавленный остов.{/n}

{n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Торпедный залп сотрясает флагман, и творение ксеносов разлетается на куски под его сокрушительным натиском. По расчетам корабельных инженеров, прямое попадание должно оставить от нее лишь оплавленный остов.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}

{n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}

languages.text: {n}魚雷の斉射で旗艦は激しく揺れ、異星生物の建造物はその猛烈な攻撃で粉々に砕け散った。艦の技術者は、直撃すれば溶けた廃墟しか残らないと推定している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}魚雷の斉射で旗艦は激しく揺れ、異星生物の建造物はその猛烈な攻撃で粉々に砕け散った。艦の技術者は、直撃すれば溶けた廃墟しか残らないと推定している。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La salva de torpedos hace que la nave insignia se estremezca y la creación xenos queda hecha pedazos por la brutal andanada. Los ingenieros de la nave calculan que un impacto directo no dejará más que restos fundidos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La salva de torpedos hace que la nave insignia se estremezca y la creación xenos queda hecha pedazos por la brutal andanada. Los ingenieros de la nave calculan que un impacto directo no dejará más que restos fundidos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}鱼雷齐射，震得旗舰颤抖，异形造物在毁灭性的轰击下化为齑粉。舰船工程师估计，如此直接的命中，剩下的应当只有一片熔毁的残骸。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}鱼雷齐射，震得旗舰颤抖，异形造物在毁灭性的轰击下化为齑粉。舰船工程师估计，如此直接的命中，剩下的应当只有一片熔毁的残骸。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Torpedosalve lässt das Flaggschiff erzittern, als das Bauwerk der Xenos durch die Explosion in Stücke gerissen wird. Die Schiffsingenieure vermuten, dass ein direkter Treffer nichts als ein geschmolzenes Wrack zurücklassen dürfte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Torpedosalve lässt das Flaggschiff erzittern, als das Bauwerk der Xenos durch die Explosion in Stücke gerissen wird. Die Schiffsingenieure vermuten, dass ein direkter Treffer nichts als ein geschmolzenes Wrack zurücklassen dürfte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Torpido salvosu, sancak gemisini titretiyor. Zeno yaratımı, ezici saldırı sonucu parçalara ayrılıyor. Gemi mühendisleri, doğrudan bir isabetin arkasında erimiş bir enkazdan başka bir şey bırakmaması gerektiğini tahmin ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Torpido salvosu, sancak gemisini titretiyor. Zeno yaratımı, ezici saldırı sonucu parçalara ayrılıyor. Gemi mühendisleri, doğrudan bir isabetin arkasında erimiş bir enkazdan başka bir şey bırakmaması gerektiğini tahmin ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La salve de torpilles fait trembler le vaisseau en quittant ses entrailles pour s'envoler en direction de la création xénos qu'elle noie sous un déluge d'explosions. Selon les estimations des ingénieurs, cette frappe directe devrait réduire la structure en poussière.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The torpedo salvo makes the flagship shudder, and the xenos creation is blown to pieces by its crushing onslaught. The ship's engineers estimate that a direct hit should leave nothing but a melted wreck behind.{/n}
